description: Generates AI text summaries, answers questions, or processes data using OpenAI GPT models.
plainEnglishExplanation: This node sends the incoming text to GPT for summarization.

setupGuide.title: Getting your OpenAI API Key
setupGuide.summary: To use AI models, you need a secret API key from OpenAI.
steps: Log into platform.openai.com and navigate to API Keys.
Click 'Create new secret key', give it a name, and copy the key starting with sk-...

requiredFields.label: AI Prompt / Instructions
requiredFields.description: The prompt or instruction to send to the AI model
